tools.name: get_trending_tokens
tools.description: Ranked trending tokens on Robinhood Chain by trendScore (0-100, z-scores vs each token's own 7d baseline). Includes price, 24h volume, holders, trajectory.

tools.name: get_token
tools.description: Full detail for one token by symbol (e.g. TSLA, CASHCAT) or 0x address: latest snapshot, compact trend history, recent intel signals, whale transfers. Canonical Robinhood stock tokens win symbol collisions over memecoin impersonators.

tools.name: get_intel
tools.description: Recent intel signals (volume spikes, whale transfers, stock-token oracle divergence, depegs, tvl moves...) with severity 1-5 and provenance. Optionally filter by category.

tools.name: get_narratives
tools.description: Current narratives ranked by mindshare: static categories plus LLM-named dynamic clusters of co-moving tokens, with stability labels (flash/fresh/persistent/durable) and member symbols.

tools.name: get_chain_stats
tools.description: Latest Robinhood Chain stats: TVL, 24h DEX volume, stablecoin mcap, transactions today, total addresses.

tools.name: check_token_risk
tools.description: Pre-trade risk readout for a Robinhood Chain token by symbol or 0x address — designed to be called BEFORE placing a trade elsewhere (e.g. via robinhood agentic trading). Returns observed data only, never a buy/sell recommendation: liquidity/volume/holders, rug-guard status, launch-radar assessment w

tools.name: get_launch_radar
tools.description: Launch radar: early-stage Robinhood Chain candidates discovered from X chatter + onchain scans, each with the three-output assessment (riskGate pass|watch|fail, opportunity 0-100 or blocked, data confidence high|medium|low), safety score, liquidity and paid-promotion flag. A high score means 'nothin

tools.name: get_kol_leaderboard
tools.description: Robinhood Chain KOL leaderboard — accounts ranked ONLY by verified onchain call performance (never followers): one call per contract, entry priced at the first post-tweet observation, +50% peak = win, rug-shills heavily penalized, minimum 3 verified calls to rank. Includes the on-watch bench (call e

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_kol_leaderboard · Private data: get_trending_tokens, get_token, get_intel, get_narratives, check_token_risk · Public sink: get_kol_leaderboard.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_kol_leaderboard · Private data: get_trending_tokens, get_token, get_intel, get_narratives, check_token_risk · Public sink: get_kol_leaderboard

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
